message:
feat(fp-types): add nancumsum/nancumprod/nancummax/nancummin/nanquantile/nanarg parity (frankenpandas-hexr)

Six nan-aware reductions on Scalar slices, mirroring the numpy/pandas
surface the existing nan* helpers cover:

- nancumsum / nancumprod — running sum / product; null positions emit
  Null(NaN) without advancing the accumulator (matches
  pd.Series.cumsum/cumprod).
- nancummax / nancummin — running extrema with the same null pass-
  through behavior as cumsum; first non-missing value seeds the
  running value.
- nanquantile(values, q) — linear-interpolation quantile over non-
  missing finite values; empty input or q outside [0.0, 1.0] yields
  Null(NaN). Matches np.nanquantile(interpolation='linear').
- nanargmax / nanargmin — position of the first non-missing extremum,
  None when every value is missing. Matches np.nanargmax/nanargmin.

Co-lands frankenpandas-9bv2 (cummax/min), 90aq (nanquantile),
qmu1 (nanargmax/min).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
